display.purpose: Hero headlines and primary section titles only. Sora 800.

title.purpose: Card headings and subsection labels. Sora 600.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy. Plus Jakarta Sans 400. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Dates, tags, code, technical metadata only. JetBrains Mono 700 uppercase tracked.

shadows.name: lime-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover ONLY. The only colored shadow in the system.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions: hover, focus, theme toggle.

motion.name: slow
motion.purpose: Entrance animations and large layout transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary CTA. Lime fill inverts the palette — the most visually distinct element on any page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; background: #E0FF4F; color: #09090b; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d4f038; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(224,255,79,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E0FF4F; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with muted border; border and text shift to lime on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; background: transparent; color: #fafafa; border: 2px solid #71717a; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #E0FF4F; color: #E0FF4F; background: rgba(224,255,79,0.05); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E0FF4F; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Flat at rest, lifted 4px on hover. Used for experience items, projects, and blog posts.
components.html:
2023

Staff DevOps Engineer

Led GPU infrastructure at scale across distributed ML training clusters.

KubernetesNVIDIA
components.css: .ds-card { background: #18181b; border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.75rem; transition: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); position: relative; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fafafa; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #a1a1aa; margin: 0; } .ds-card-date { display: inline-block; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; background: rgba(224,255,79,0.08); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #E0FF4F; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-card-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 1.25rem; } .ds-tag { padding: 0.35rem 0.85rem; background: #27272a; color: #a1a1aa; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 9999px; transition: 150ms ease; } .ds-tag:hover { color: #E0FF4F; background: rgba(224,255,79,0.08); }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: 72px frosted zinc bar. Links use a 2px lime underline indicator that grows from center on hover/active.
components.html:
SC
  • About
  • Resume
  • Projects
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; background: rgba(9,9,11,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); z-index: 100; height: 72px; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-inner { width: 80%; max-width: 1920px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fafafa; text-decoration: none; transition: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-logo:hover { color: #E0FF4F; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; color: #a1a1aa; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 50%; width: 0; height: 2px; background: #E0FF4F; transition: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transform: translateX(-50%); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #fafafa; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link--active::after { width: calc(100% - 2rem); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #fafafa; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Uppercase monospace eyebrow label above section headings. Uses Alert Lime at very low opacity.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: inline-block; padding: 0.35rem 1rem; background: rgba(224,255,79,0.08); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #E0FF4F; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview:
This is a precision instrumentation aesthetic, not a marketing aesthetic. The design operates the way a well-configured monitoring system does: information surfaces exactly when it's needed, hierarchy communicates priority at a glance, and the accent color carries one meaning only — a live indicator, not decoration. Every layout decision is defensible as a structural choice.

The surface is almost entirely Zinc Black and zinc neutrals. A single Alert Lime occupies less than 8% of any screen — used on CTAs, active states, date chips, and hover indicators. That rarity is the mechanism. When recruiter eyes land on the lime, it marks exactly what matters: a call to action, a live system, a highlight worth reading.

This system explicitly rejects generic developer portfolio templates (same hero + skills grid + contact form, repeated endlessly), agency-portfolio scroll-jacking and particle flair, and dark-SaaS clichés like purple-to-pink gradients, neon glassmorphism cards, and hero-metric stat blocks.
keyCharacteristics: Near-achromatic dark base: three zinc steps carry all depth
Single functional accent: Alert Lime is a status indicator, not a design flourish
Typographic hierarchy does the heavy lifting: scale ratios exceed 1.3x between steps
Shadows respond to interaction: flat at rest, ambient depth on hover
Monospace as a semantic signal: JetBrains Mono appears only on labels, dates, and code

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Alert Lime appears on ≤8% of any screen. It marks CTAs, active states, and date chips only. A second lime element in the same viewport dilutes the signal.

rules.name: The No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Neither pure white (#ffffff) nor pure black (#000000) appears anywhere. Zinc Black (#09090b) and Chalk White (#fafafa) are the extremes.

rules.name: The Mono Semantic Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono means: date, tag, code, or technical metadata. It never appears in running prose or headings.

rules.name: The Tight Headlines Rule
rules.body: Display and Headline use negative letter-spacing (-0.025em to -0.03em). Wide-tracked headlines at large scale read as undecided, not refined.

rules.name: The Responsive Depth Rule
rules.body: Shadows are state feedback. At rest: ambient-mid. On hover: ambient-lift. On press: ambient-low. Never apply ambient-high to non-floating elements.

rules.name: The One Glow Rule
rules.body: The lime glow appears only on .btn-primary:hover. Nowhere else. A second lime glow creates visual competition with the primary CTA.

dos: Do use Alert Lime exclusively for interactive state signals: CTAs, active nav underlines, date chips, hover text shifts.
Do use JetBrains Mono only for metadata: dates, technology tags, code snippets.
Do let tonal zinc steps carry all at-rest depth.
Do apply negative letter-spacing to Display and Headline.
Do cap body line length at 65ch.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for the neural network background and scroll animations.
Do scale shadows with interaction state.
Do use evidence-first copy: company names, years, outcomes, metrics.
donts: Don't use generic Bootstrap-style template layouts: same hero + skills grid + contact form repeated section by section.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't add a second accent color.
Don't use purple-to-pink gradients, neon glows, or dark-SaaS hero metric cards.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't add shadows or glows at rest to non-interactive elements.
Don't use the lime accent on more than one element per visible viewport block.
